title: thamnosma socotrana
intro: Thamnosma socotrana, also known as Socotran Rue, is a succulent plant native to the island of Socotra in Yemen. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is valued for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Thamnosma socotrana are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
